data.body: Update three small doc files: (1) ticket-sync-events-contract.md line 20: replace 'defined in the tk wrapper at plugins/dso/scripts/tk' with 'defined in plugins/dso/scripts/tk-sync-lib.sh'. (2) PRE-COMMIT-TIMEOUT-WRAPPER.md: remove the issue_tracker.create_cmd row from the Config Keys table and the accompanying example config block showing issue_tracker.create_cmd=... (the wrapper still supports ticket creation but via direct ticket create command, not via config key). (3) dso-config.example.conf: remove the 'issue_tracker.create_cmd=ticket create' line. test-exempt: no conditional logic, pure documentation edits. Regression verified by RED test bbfb-ce09.
